help.title: My Garage
help.description: Add your cars to your garage to instantly see which products fit your vehicles. This helps us personalize your shopping experience and show you compatible parts.

error.title: Unable to load garage
error.message: We're having trouble loading your garage. Please try refreshing the page or try again later.

empty.title: Your garage is empty
empty.message: Add your vehicles to get personalized product recommendations
empty.noCarsTitle: It looks like you haven't added any cars to your garage yet!
empty.noCarsDescription: Adding your car will help us make your shopping experience even better.

remove.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this car from your garage? This action cannot be undone.

addCarDialog.title: Add New Car
addCarDialog.description: By adding a car to your garage your shopping experience will be easier and you will be able to find what you are looking for faster.
